login.title: Sign in
login.lead: Sign in to use the CVE module. Create an account if registration is enabled.
login.registerClosed: Registration is disabled. Sign in with an existing account.

emailLogs.title: Email log
emailLogs.lead: CVE report sends from «Send email»: one row per recipient (success, error code and message). SMTP and network errors appear here.
emailLogs.empty: No entries yet. Rows appear after you send a report email from the home page.
emailLogs.footnote: Whether mail reaches each inbox depends on the recipient server; this log records only this app’s SMTP attempt.

home.title: Today's CVEs
home.lead: NVD records for the last completed daily window (timezone and time from settings: previous day at that time → today at that time). Save writes to the DB with Turkish descriptions. Download report builds a PDF from DB rows in that window.

feed.windowCardHint: NVD query range in your scheduled timezone; live end extends to now.
feed.dbNewestHint: Latest publication time among CVE rows stored in the database.
feed.totalNvdNote: NVD reported total ({nvd}) differs from this list ({list}); try refresh. Often pagination or timing.
feed.saveAlreadySynced: All items in this window are already saved to the database.
feed.reportMinioFailed: PDF downloaded; upload to MinIO failed (check server logs).
feed.emailPartial: Could not deliver to: {list}. Other recipients were sent successfully; see the email log for a row per address.
feed.emailNeedsReportFirst: Use “Download report” first; the attachment is taken from MinIO when available, otherwise generated on the server.

settings.title: Settings
settings.lead: SMTP, scheduled NVD sync, and report recipients. Stored in `cve_settings` as JSON rows `smtp`, `cron`, and `email`.
settings.cronHint: Runs at the chosen local time every day (or on selected weekdays). Each run covers the 24 hours ending at that time (e.g. yesterday 09:00–today 09:00).
settings.cronEmailNote: To email the PDF report, use «Send email» on the home page; recipients are set under Email.
settings.passwordKeep: Enter a new password to change
settings.daysEmptyHint: If none selected, the job runs every day.
settings.emailHint: PDF reports sent via «Send email» on Today's CVEs go to these addresses.
settings.recipientsPh: Type an address, confirm with a comma
settings.recipientsCommaHint: Separate with commas; each part appears as a small chip.
